# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: "config.istio.io/v1alpha2"
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: enable-admin-interface
spec:
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: POD
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND | SIDECAR_INBOUND
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
  - applyTo: ENVOY_OBJECT
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        listeners:
        - name: listener_admin
          address:
            socketAddress: { protocol: TCP, portValue: 15000 }
  - applyTo: ENVOY_OBJECT
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        admin:
          accessLogPath: /dev/null
          profilePath: /var/lib/istio/envoy/profile-outbound.pb
          clusterStatsTags:
            request_count: requests
            success_count: responses_2xx
            failure_count: responses_5xx
  - applyTo: ENVOY_OBJECT
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        listeners:
        - name: listener_admin
          address:
            socketAddress: { protocol: TCP, portValue: 15000 }
  - applyTo: ENVOY_OBJECT
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        admin:
          accessLogPath: /dev/null
          profilePath: /var/lib/istio/envoy/profile-inbound.pb
          clusterStatsTags:
            request_count: requests
            success_count: responses_2xx
            failure_count: responses_5xx
